overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a detailed recreation of Manhattan. The clip progresses from a street with delivery trucks toward the Empire State Building, past a subway entrance, and into a busy pedestrian plaza with autumn foliage and dense crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked delivery trucks

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily past parked delivery trucks and down the city street

entered.detail: Large white delivery truck with red 'OUR' branding parked on the left side of the street
Yellow taxi cab visible in the distance on the left
Multi-story beige building with arched windows and stone facade
Tall building with stone exterior and ground-floor storefronts

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks past parked delivery trucks on an urban street. The scene features historic buildings with sparse pedestrian activity and vehicles parked along the curb under clear autumn skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown avenue with view of Empire State Building

events.description: Empire State Building becomes visible in the distance between the avenue buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue toward the distant skyscraper, passing parked cars

entered.detail: Iconic art deco skyscraper with spire visible in the distance down the avenue
Trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage lining the right sidewalk
Modern high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: Walking down the avenue, the Empire State Building comes into view in the distance. Autumn trees line the right side of the street as Spider-Man continues forward past parked vehicles.

events.description: passing green subway entrance structure on the right side
turning right to cross the intersection toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating the crosswalk and turning right at the intersection while avoiding pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket and knit hat waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: Green metal subway entrance structure with stairs leading underground and advertising signage
Traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man passes a green subway entrance and navigates a busy intersection. Pedestrians wait at the crosswalk as the character turns right to cross the street toward a plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with flower planters and outdoor seating

events.description: entering pedestrian plaza from the street, ground changes to tiled pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded plaza, weaving between pedestrians and past outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: man in black business suit walking past the camera
woman in green jacket walking in the same direction

entered.detail: Large rectangular planters with colorful flowers and trimmed cone-shaped shrubs
Tables and chairs arranged along the plaza for outdoor dining
White food vending cart with red and blue signage

segments.scene_description: Entering a busy pedestrian plaza filled with people, flower planters, and outdoor seating. Spider-Man walks through the crowd as pedestrians move in various directions around the tiled public space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet urban street that gradually opens into a bustling, crowded pedestrian plaza. It begins with Spider-Man walking past parked delivery trucks and historic buildings under clear autumn skies. As he continues down the avenue, the Empire State Building emerges in the distance while autumn trees begin to line the roadside. The scene then shifts as he passes a green subway entrance and navigates a busy intersection, turning right to leave the street behind. Finally, the camera follows him into a dense public plaza filled with flower planters, outdoor seating, and a throng of pedestrians moving across the tiled space.
